calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jason M. Rose, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, VYRTICE CARTER-ORANGE and JOSEPH ORANGE ("Plaintiffs").
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDRED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiff VYRTICE CARTER-ORANGE and JOSEPH ORANGE shall recover damages from defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY in the following amounts: as to Plaintiff VYRTICE CARTER-ORANGE, $50,000.00 in Economic Damages, 300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, and, as to Plaintiff JOSEPH ORANGE, $50,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a combined total amount of $400,000.00
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
